race.comment: Tough. SUPREME THUNDER (3) has been knocking on the door from wide barriers and draws inside here. Came from last beaten a nose at Murray Bridge and then made solid inroads at Naracoorte. The extra metres suit and sitting handier, this is winnable. LUMBER DREAM (2) has been plainer his last two, but his two runs prior read well enough. Murtagh replaces the apprentice and he will be hitting the line back in grade. SUNSET PRAYER (11) improved at Mt Gambier two back and stepping up to this distance should suit. She placed her only start here and should be around the mark.  EVERYTHINGISAUTUMN (12) is a former Victorian who has needed her two start for the new yard. Maps well today and we are likely to see improvement.
